controls.title: Logging
controls.evidence_summary: Structured logging exists, but privileged account deletion has no audit event and production retention evidence is absent.
controls.confidence_rationale: Application logging code and the missing privileged-action audit call were reviewed, but production retention and monitoring records were not available.
controls.evidence_quality_rationale: Evidence is partial because source anchors support selected logging behavior but operational log governance requires manual artifacts.

findings.title: Privileged user deletion is not audit logged
findings.description: The admin delete route deletes a user without writing an audit log event.

evidence.assessment: The deletion path has no audit logger invocation before or after the sensitive change.

findings.gap: Privileged data modifications lack a durable audit trail.
findings.recommendation: Add structured audit logging for privileged user changes.

recommendations: Add audit logging for admin actions
